specific_location: 100 yards west of the Prairie Loop Bird Observatory on the south side of Cherry Creek State Park.
description: Bird was of similar size to the six Snowy Egrets and slightly larger than the Cattle Egret. They all flew in at the same time at the edge of the lake. The Little Blue Heron had a reddish brown neck and head and slate blue body. Have photo and observed through binoculars from about 60 feet away.Behavior: All the birds were preening and calm.Call: NonePlumage: Breeding
photographer: Photographer: Kay Rasmussen, Kay Rasmussen, Kay Rasmussen
